hero_title: Welcome! I Build Smart and Secure Digital Experiences
hero_text: ``Debugging is like being the detective in a crime movie where you are also the murderer.`` - Filipe Fortes
about_text: I’m Stefan Rautner, 19 years old, and I develop smart home systems & automations that are reliable, secure, and practical for everyday life.
contact_text: Feel free to reach out for collaboration or freelance projects.

projects.title: Löschwasserförderung
projects.text: Multi-Platform application for calculating relay lines for the Austrian Fire Brigades.

projects.title: SparkNet
projects.text: A cross-platform smart home system integrating automation, security, AI assistance, and remote device management, with features like voice control, image recognition, and a user-friendly interface.

projects.title: KiAuto-Windows
projects.text:
KiAuto-Windows is a version of KiAuto that I partly adapted for Windows.
KiAuto is primarily used for exporting various views such as circuit disgrams in the KiCad EDA Program.

projects.title: TinyWhatsApp
projects.text: TinyWhatsApp is a multi-platform chat application that communicates with a central server and a database.

projects.title: MBot-Controller
projects.text:
WebApp and intermediate server for controlling and displaying sensor data of an MBot2.
The MBot2 is controlled via a WLAN connection.

projects.title: Loeschzeit
projects.text: Loeschzeit is an app for timing participants in children's water-spraying competitions, used as an attraction at volunteer fire department festivals.

projects.title: SnackSignal
projects.text: SnackSignal is an ordering system for club festivals, supporting cash and card payments and efficiently managing orders.

projects.title: Nexus
projects.text: Nexus integrates Loeschzeit and SnackSignal with monitoring, automated tests, metrics in graphs, HTTPS encryption, uptime monitoring, an orchestrator, Stripe payment pages, and a reverse tunnel.

certificates.title: Create Digital Content, Communicate and Collaborate Online

voluntary.title: Team122.at Member
voluntary.text:
Supporting disaster and civil protection by developing and operatiing hardware and softwarte solutions.
My contribution to the Team122 so far is the software löschwasserförderung.at, which was also my thesis.

Following the motto:
Rescue - Extinguish - Salvage - Protect
